name: GA1: Core Features - Hand-Grading Rubric

parts.name: Library View — ViewModel + Tests

criteria.name: L1: refresh() loads collections

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Implementation correctly loads collections via service layer, populates observable list, and has a mapped passing test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Implementation has minor issues (e.g., does not clear old data before repopulating) or test is weak.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented, does not work on inspection, or no mapped test.

criteria.description: refresh() loads collections from the service layer and populates the observable list.

criteria.name: L2: Collection entry exposes ID, title, source type, recipe count

checks.name: Met
checks.description: All four fields (ID, title, source type, recipe count) are accessible from collection entries and verified by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Some fields missing or test only checks a subset.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Each collection entry exposes ID, title, source type, and recipe count.

criteria.name: L3: selectCollection(id) updates selection and recipe list

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Selecting a collection updates selected collection property and populates recipe list correctly. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Selection updates but recipe list has issues, or test only partially covers the behavior.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: selectCollection(id) updates the selected collection and populates the recipe list.

criteria.name: L4: createCollection(title) adds a new collection

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Creating a collection works and the new collection is visible after refresh. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Collection is created but does not appear without manual refresh, or test is weak.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: createCollection(title) adds a new collection and it appears after refresh.

criteria.name: L5: deleteCollection(id) removes collection after undo timeout

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Delete removes collection after undo timeout. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Delete works but timeout behavior is incorrect, or test is weak.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: deleteCollection(id) removes the collection (after undo timeout expires).

criteria.name: L6: Undo available for 5 seconds; undoDelete() restores collection

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Undo state is available after delete, undoDelete() restores the collection, and undo message is shown. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Undo restores collection but undo state/message tracking has issues, or test only partially covers behavior.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: After delete, undo is available for 5 seconds; undoDelete() restores the collection.

criteria.name: L7: Undo state clears after 5-second timeout

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Undo availability clears after timeout. Test uses short duration to verify timeout behavior.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented, timeout not configurable for testing, or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Undo state clears after the 5-second timeout (uses configurable Duration for testing).

criteria.name: L8: refresh() is async; loading indicator while fetching

checks.name: Met
checks.description: refresh() uses BackgroundTaskRunner, loading property is true during fetch and false after. Test verifies async behavior.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Async loading works but loading indicator is not properly toggled, or test does not verify the async aspect.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: refresh() runs on a background thread via BackgroundTaskRunner; loading indicator is true while fetching.

criteria.name: L9: Selecting collection then recipe provides recipe ID for navigation

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Recipe selection within a collection exposes the recipe ID for navigation. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Selecting a collection then selecting a recipe provides the recipe ID for navigation.

criteria.name: L10: Edge case — nonexistent collection ID handled gracefully

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Gracefully handles nonexistent ID. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Selecting a nonexistent collection ID is handled gracefully (no crash, appropriate state).

criteria.name: L11: filterTextProperty() filters collections by title

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Filter correctly narrows collection list by case-insensitive substring match. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Filtering works but is case-sensitive or has other minor issues.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: filterTextProperty() filters collections by title (case-insensitive substring match).

criteria.name: L12: Filtered list updates immediately (no debounce)

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Filter updates synchronously/immediately. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Filtered list updates immediately as the user types (no debounce — it's in-memory).

criteria.name: L13: Undo-delete works correctly with active filter

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Undo + filter interaction is correct. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Undo-delete works correctly with an active filter (restored collection reappears only if it matches the current filter; clearing the filter always shows all collections).

parts.description: Grade each requirement below. Award points only if the implementation passes TA inspection AND the student has mapped a passing test to the requirement in Pawtograder.

parts.name: Recipe Editor — ViewModel + Tests

criteria.name: E1: loadRecipe(id) populates recipe, title, and ingredients

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Loading a recipe correctly populates all fields (recipe object, title, ingredient list). Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Recipe loads but some fields are not properly populated, or test only checks a subset of fields.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: loadRecipe(id) populates the current recipe, title, and ingredient list.

criteria.name: E2: toggleEditMode() enables/disables editing

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Edit mode toggles correctly between view and edit states. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: toggleEditMode() enables/disables editing.

criteria.name: E3: Editing title/ingredients sets isDirty to true

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Dirty state is correctly tracked when title or ingredients change in edit mode. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Dirty tracking works for title but not ingredients (or vice versa), or has issues with programmatic resets (see Gotchas).

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Changing the title or ingredients in edit mode sets isDirty to true.

criteria.name: E4: discardChanges() reverts to original state and clears dirty

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Discard reverts title/ingredients to original values and sets isDirty to false. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Discard partially works (e.g., reverts title but not ingredients, or does not clear dirty state).

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: discardChanges() reverts to the original recipe state and clears dirty.

criteria.name: E5: isValid is false when title is blank; true otherwise

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Validation correctly tracks blank title. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: isValid is false when the title is blank; true otherwise.

criteria.name: E6: addIngredient() / removeIngredient(index) modify list

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Add and remove ingredient operations work correctly. Covered by mapped test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: One operation works but not the other, or edge cases (remove at invalid index) not handled.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: addIngredient() / removeIngredient(index) modify the ingredient list.

criteria.name: E7: save() persists the edited recipe

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Save persists changes via RecipeRepository.save(). On success, exits edit mode and shows success message. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Save persists but does not exit edit mode or show success message, or test is weak.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: save() persists the edited recipe to the repository.

criteria.name: E8: save() is async; isSaving is true while in progress

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Save uses BackgroundTaskRunner. isSaving property is true during save and false after. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Async save works but isSaving is not properly toggled, or test does not verify async aspect.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: save() runs on a background thread via BackgroundTaskRunner; isSaving is true while in progress.

criteria.name: E9: Save failure preserves edit mode and dirty state, shows error

checks.name: Met
checks.description: On save failure, stays in edit mode, dirty state preserved, error message shown. Covered by test (e.g., mock throws).

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Error handling partially works (e.g., shows error but clears dirty state, or exits edit mode on failure).

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Save failure: stays in edit mode, preserves dirty state, shows error message.

criteria.name: E10: Edge case — save() while not dirty or not valid is a no-op

checks.name: Met
checks.description: save() is a no-op when not dirty or not valid. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: save() while not dirty or not valid is a no-op.

parts.description: Grade each requirement below. Award points only if the implementation passes TA inspection AND the student has mapped a passing test to the requirement in Pawtograder.

parts.name: Import Interface — ViewModel + Tests

criteria.name: I1: Initial state is idle; no imported recipe, no error

checks.name: Met
checks.description: ViewModel starts in idle state with no recipe and no error. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Initial state is idle; no imported recipe, no error.

criteria.name: I2: startImport(path) transitions to processing; status updates

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Starting import transitions to PROCESSING state with appropriate status message. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: State transitions but status message is missing or unclear.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: startImport(path) transitions to processing state; status message updates.

criteria.name: I3: Successful OCR transitions to review; recipe populated

checks.name: Met
checks.description: After OCR success, state is REVIEW and imported recipe is accessible. Covered by test (uses FakeRecipeOcrService).

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Transitions to review but recipe data is incomplete or test does not verify recipe content.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Successful OCR transitions to review state; imported recipe is populated.

criteria.name: I4: OCR failure transitions to error; error message populated

checks.name: Met
checks.description: On OCR failure, state is ERROR and error message describes the problem. Covered by test (mock throws exception).

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Transitions to error but message is generic or missing.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: OCR failure transitions to error state; error message is populated.

criteria.name: I5: cancelImport() during processing transitions to idle

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Cancelling during processing returns to idle state. Handles task cancellation correctly (does not rely on onFailed callback). Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: cancelImport() during processing transitions back to idle.

criteria.name: I6: acceptImport() saves recipe to selected collection, returns to idle

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Accept saves recipe to selected collection and returns to idle. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Saves recipe but does not transition to idle, or does not use LibrarianService.saveRecipe().

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: acceptImport() saves the recipe to the selected collection via LibrarianService.saveRecipe() and transitions to idle.

criteria.name: I7: rejectImport() discards recipe and returns to idle

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Rejecting import discards recipe and returns to idle. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: rejectImport() discards the imported recipe and transitions to idle.

criteria.name: I8: Available collections loaded from repository

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Collection list is populated from service layer for target selection. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Available collections are loaded from the repository.

criteria.name: I9: Pre-save editing of title and ingredients

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Title and ingredients can be edited during review before accepting. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Only title or only ingredients are editable, or edits are not persisted when accepting.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Pre-save editing: imported recipe title/ingredients can be modified before accept.

criteria.name: I10: Edge case — acceptImport() with no collection or no recipe is no-op

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Accept is a no-op when collection or recipe is missing. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: acceptImport() with no selected collection or no recipe is a no-op.

parts.description: Grade each requirement below. Award points only if the implementation passes TA inspection AND the student has mapped a passing test to the requirement in Pawtograder.

parts.name: Search & Filter — ViewModel + Tests

criteria.name: S1: Setting search query triggers search and populates results

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Setting query triggers search and results are populated. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Search fires but results are not properly populated, or test is weak.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Setting the search query triggers a search and populates results.

criteria.name: S2: Search by title returns matching recipes via resolveRecipes()

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Title search correctly delegates to resolveRecipes() and returns matches. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Search works but does not use resolveRecipes(), or test only checks result count not content.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Search by title returns matching recipes via resolveRecipes().

criteria.name: S3: Ingredient filter narrows results via searchByIngredient()

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Ingredient filter correctly narrows results using searchByIngredient(). Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Filter narrows results but implementation or test has minor issues.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Adding an ingredient filter narrows results via searchByIngredient().

criteria.name: S4: Multiple ingredient filters use AND logic (intersection)

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Multiple filters intersect results (AND logic). Covered by test with 2+ ingredient filters.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Uses OR logic instead of AND, or test does not verify intersection behavior.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Multiple ingredient filters use AND logic (intersection).

criteria.name: S5: Clearing filters/query resets results

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Clearing query and filters resets the result list. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Clearing filters/query resets results.

criteria.name: S6: Search is async; isSearching is true while running

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Search uses BackgroundTaskRunner and isSearching property toggles correctly. Covered by test.

checks.name: Partially met
checks.description: Async works but isSearching not properly toggled, or test does not verify async aspect.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Search runs on a background thread via BackgroundTaskRunner; isSearching is true while running.

criteria.name: S7: Search is debounced (300ms delay)

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Debounce works correctly (only text query, not filter changes). Test uses short configurable delay. Handles race conditions (e.g., generation counter).

checks.name: Not met
checks.description:
Not implemented, debounce incorrect, delay not configurable for
testing, or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Search is debounced (300ms delay after last keystroke before firing). Debounce delay is configurable for testing.

criteria.name: S8: selectNextResult() / selectPreviousResult() cycle through results

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Keyboard navigation cycles through results correctly. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: selectNextResult() / selectPreviousResult() cycle through results.

criteria.name: S9: navigateToSelectedResult() provides recipe ID for navigation

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Navigation provides selected recipe ID to NavigationService. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: navigateToSelectedResult() provides the selected recipe ID for navigation.

criteria.name: S10: Status message reflects result count

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Status message updates with result count. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Status message reflects result count (e.g., "5 results" or "No results found").

criteria.name: S11: Edge case — empty query with no filters returns all recipes

checks.name: Met
checks.description: Empty query with no filters uses listAllRecipes() and returns all recipes. Covered by test.

checks.name: Not met
checks.description: Not implemented or no mapped test.

criteria.description: Empty query with no filters returns all recipes (via listAllRecipes()).

parts.description: Grade each requirement below. Award points only if the implementation passes TA inspection AND the student has mapped a passing test to the requirement in Pawtograder. Teams of 3 may omit this feature entirely.

parts.name: Custom Contribution (5-Person Teams)

criteria.name: Implementation vs. Agreed Expectations

checks.name: Meets expectations
checks.description: All expected functionality works correctly and meaningful enhancements or polish are present.

checks.name: Nearly meets expectations
checks.description: Implementation meets the agreed expectations. Core functionality works as discussed with TA and instructor.

checks.name: Approaching expectations
checks.description: Implementation addresses most of the agreed expectations but has some gaps in functionality or polish.

checks.name: Below expectations
checks.description: Implementation falls significantly short of agreed expectations. Some functionality is present but major gaps remain.

checks.name: Minimal or no implementation
checks.description: Little to no meaningful implementation relative to what was agreed upon.

criteria.description: Assess the overall functionality of the student's implementation relative to expectations previously agreed upon between the TA, instructor, and student. Select the bucket that best matches the delivered work.

parts.description: For 5-person teams only. The 5th team member implements a custom contribution agreed upon in advance with the TA and instructor, rather than one of the four core features. Grade based on functionality of the implementation relative to expectations previously set between the TA, instructor, and student.

parts.name: View Implementation

criteria.name: FXML Layout

checks.name: Well-structured layout
checks.description: FXML is clean, uses appropriate layout containers, follows GA0 design. Separate panes for distinct states (if applicable).

checks.name: Acceptable layout
checks.description: Layout works but has structural issues (e.g., poor container choice, hardcoded sizes, or deviates significantly from design).

checks.name: Minimal layout
checks.description: Basic layout present but poorly structured or mostly incomplete.

checks.name: Missing or non-functional
checks.description: No FXML layout or layout does not render.

criteria.description: FXML layout is well-structured and follows the design from GA0.

criteria.name: Controller ViewModel Binding

checks.name: Correct bindings
checks.description: Controller properly binds ViewModel observable properties to UI controls. Uses property binding or listeners appropriately. Handles visible/managed for state-dependent panes.

checks.name: Partially correct
checks.description: Most bindings work but some are missing or use manual updates instead of property binding where binding would be appropriate.

checks.name: Weak bindings
checks.description: Controller manually pushes/pulls data instead of using property binding. ViewModel is underutilized.

checks.name: Missing or broken
checks.description: No controller or bindings are fundamentally broken.

criteria.description: Controller correctly binds FXML controls to ViewModel properties.

criteria.name: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility

checks.name: Good accessibility
checks.description: Feature is keyboard-navigable, focus order is logical, and accessibility considerations from GA0 are applied.

checks.name: Basic accessibility
checks.description: Some keyboard support but incomplete (e.g., tab order is off, or key shortcuts missing where expected).

checks.name: No accessibility consideration
checks.description: No evidence of keyboard navigation or accessibility support.

criteria.description: Feature supports keyboard navigation and follows accessibility guidelines from GA0 plan.

parts.description: Evaluate the student's FXML layout and controller implementation. This applies to whatever feature the student implemented.

parts.name: Code Quality

criteria.name: Naming & Terminology

checks.name: Inconsistent or unclear naming
checks.description: Names do not follow team terminology, are misleading, or are inconsistent with the ViewModel interface contract.

criteria.description: Code follows the team's user-facing terminology for naming. Variable, method, and class names are clear and consistent.

criteria.name: Code Clarity

checks.name: Unnecessarily complex or unclear code
checks.description: Logic that could be simplified, or code that is hard to follow without explanation. Comments where needed are missing.

criteria.description: Code is clean and understandable. No unnecessarily complex logic.

parts.description: Evaluate naming, code clarity, and appropriate documentation in the student's ViewModel and View code.

parts.name: Individual Accountability Adjustment

criteria.name: Additional positive bonus
Meeting 3: GA1 Progress Code Walk (Apr 6-7)

checks.name: Demonstrates comprehension
checks.description: Student can explain their code at both a high level and in detail, articulate design decisions, and describe their workflow and collaboration. No deduction.

checks.name: Partial comprehension
checks.description: Student can explain some aspects of their code but struggles with details, design decisions, or workflow questions. Half of maximum deduction applied.

checks.name: Cannot explain code
checks.description: Student cannot explain their own code or design decisions. Full deduction applied.

checks.name: Absent without notice
checks.description: Student missed the meeting without prior notice to the TA. Full deduction applied.

criteria.description: Meeting 3 (Apr 6–7): GA1 progress check-in. Student explains what they've built so far and walks through their code and PRs. Assess across: Code Comprehension (4), Process & Workflow (3), Collaboration Evidence (2), Forward Planning (1). Use top-down questioning. Deduction applied to GA1 grade. Max deduction: -2 pts.

criteria.name: Meeting 4: GA1 Submission Code Walk (Apr 13-14)

checks.name: Demonstrates comprehension
checks.description: Student can explain their completed feature at both a high level and in detail, articulate design decisions and trade-offs, and describe their workflow and collaboration. No deduction.

checks.name: Partial comprehension
checks.description: Student can explain some aspects of their feature but struggles with details, design decisions, or trade-offs. Half of maximum deduction applied.

checks.name: Cannot explain code
checks.description: Student cannot explain their own code or design decisions. Full deduction applied.

checks.name: Absent without notice
checks.description: Student missed the meeting without prior notice to the TA. Full deduction applied.

criteria.description: Meeting 4 (Apr 13–14): GA1 submission walk-through. Student explains their completed feature implementation in detail. Assess across: Code Comprehension (4), Process & Workflow (3), Collaboration Evidence (2), Forward Planning (1). Use top-down questioning. Deduction applied to GA1 grade. Max deduction: -5 pts.

criteria.name: Additional Accountability Adjustment

checks.name: No additional adjustment needed
checks.description: Student's contribution is consistent with team performance beyond what code walk deductions already capture. No additional adjustment.

checks.name: Other deduction — minor
checks.description: Missing collaboration surveys, minimal code review participation, or other minor contribution issues not captured by code walk deductions. Enter amount in comment.

checks.name: Other deduction — major
checks.description: Missed meetings without notice, collaboration surveys indicate significant issues, or other evidence of insufficient contribution. Enter amount in comment.

criteria.description: Additional adjustment beyond code walk deductions. Other deductions (up to remaining balance of -20 after code walks) for missing meetings without notice, failing to complete collaboration surveys, lack of code review participation, or other indicators of insufficient contribution. Upward adjustments for students who went above and beyond to support teammates on an incomplete project — not extra credit for doing your own work well.

parts.description: Code walk deductions and accountability adjustments. Code walks are deductions only — students who demonstrate comprehension receive no deduction. Partial deductions (half of the maximum) may be applied when comprehension is partial. Total adjustment range: -20 to +20.

parts.name: Team — Integration Works

criteria.name: Feature Integration

checks.name: Fully integrated
checks.description: All implemented features work together seamlessly. Navigation between features works. Shared state (e.g., recipe selected in Library opens in Editor) functions correctly.

checks.name: Mostly integrated
checks.description: Features work individually but some cross-feature navigation or shared state is broken.

checks.name: Partially integrated
checks.description: Some features not connected. Navigation only partially works.

checks.name: Not integrated
checks.description: Features do not work together. Application does not launch or crashes on navigation.

criteria.description: All implemented core features (4, or 3 for 3-person teams) work together with consistent navigation.

parts.description: All implemented core features work together in one application. Navigation between features functions correctly.

parts.name: Team — Shared Infrastructure

criteria.name: Theming & Consistency

checks.name: Consistent and polished
checks.description: Consistent styling across all features. Shared CSS extended well. Error handling follows a consistent pattern. App startup/shutdown work correctly.

checks.name: Mostly consistent
checks.description: Generally consistent but some visual or behavioral inconsistencies between features.

checks.name: Inconsistent
checks.description: Each feature looks/behaves differently. Minimal shared styling or error handling.

checks.name: No shared infrastructure
checks.description: No evidence of shared theming, CSS, or error handling coordination.

criteria.description: Consistent look and feel across features. Shared CSS extended appropriately. Error handling is consistent.

parts.description: Consistent theming, navigation, error handling across implemented features.

parts.name: Team — Integration Tests

criteria.name: Integration Test Coverage

checks.name: 3+ meaningful integration tests
checks.description: At least 3 integration tests that exercise real cross-feature flows. Tests pass and cover different feature combinations.

checks.name: 1-2 integration tests
checks.description: Some integration tests exist but fewer than 3, or some only test trivial interactions.

checks.name: Weak or failing integration tests
checks.description: Integration tests exist but do not test meaningful cross-feature behavior, or they fail.

checks.name: No integration tests
checks.description: No integration tests present.

criteria.description: 3+ integration tests verifying interactions between implemented features (e.g., Library → Editor, Import → Library, etc.).

parts.description: At least 3 integration tests verifying cross-feature behavior for implemented core features.

parts.name: Team — Code Review Quality

criteria.name: Code Review Evidence

checks.name: Strong review culture
checks.description: PRs have substantive reviews with constructive feedback. HRT is evident. Design discussion present in at least one PR.

checks.name: Basic reviews
checks.description: Reviews exist but are superficial (e.g., just "LGTM") or HRT principles are not evident.

checks.name: No review evidence
checks.description: No PR reviews, or PRs were merged without review.

criteria.description: Each PR has at least one substantive review comment. Reviews demonstrate HRT (Humility, Respect, Trust). At least one PR includes design discussion.

parts.description: PRs have substantive reviews demonstrating HRT principles.

description: Manual grading rubric for GA1: Core Features (50 points total). 35 points individual (ViewModel + View) + 15 points team (integration). Each student implements one feature — apply only the matching feature part. Implementation points require both TA inspection AND a mapped test in Pawtograder. Individual Accountability Adjustment (up to +/-20) is scored from TA meeting observations and weekly collaboration surveys.
